_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of database access application programming interfaces (APIs) (e.g., Java Database Connectivity [JDBC]).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request intake, provisioning workflows, access review cycles, and deprovisioning procedures.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-003 (TF, cosine: 0.545), AI-K-020 (AI, cosine: 0.523).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.468). Shared vocabulary: [access, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [apis, application, connectivity, database, interfaces, java] vs WIDAI-only terms [cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, management, platform] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.842 (P=0.835, R=0.849). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (51.6%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of database access application programming interfaces (APIs) (e.g., Ja" and "Knowledge of data platform access management processes, including access request". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.577 > STS 0.468 (gap +0.109). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [access, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [access, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [apis, application, connectivity, database, interfaces, java]. WIDAI-only: [cycles, data, deprovisioning, intake, management, platform].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 51.6% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
STS 0.468 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
